1.title: What is ChatGPT?
1.content:
ChatGPT is a language model developed by OpenAI that can understand and generate text naturally.

It was trained on billions of texts and can help you with various daily tasks.

2.title: Why Learn ChatGPT?
2.content:
Learning to use ChatGPT can:

• Increase your productivity by up to 10x
• Automate repetitive tasks
• Generate creative ideas
• Improve your writing

3.title: Quiz: Basic Concepts
3.question: What is ChatGPT's main function?

1.title: Anatomy of a Good Prompt
1.content:
An effective prompt has 4 elements:

1. **Context**: Explain the situation
2. **Instruction**: What you want
3. **Format**: How you want the response
4. **Examples**: If needed

2.title: Common Prompt Errors
2.content:
Avoid these mistakes:

❌ Too vague prompts
❌ Lack of context
❌ Confusing instructions
❌ Unrealistic expectations

3.title: Quiz: Prompts
3.question: Which element is NOT part of a good prompt?

1.title: ChatGPT as a Specialist
1.content:
One of the most powerful techniques is making ChatGPT act as a specialist.

**Example prompt:**
"Act as a nutritionist. Create a meal plan for someone who wants to lose weight."

This technique allows you to get deeper and more contextualized responses.

2.title: Business Consulting with AI
2.content:
Use ChatGPT as a consultant:

• **SWOT Analysis**: Request complete analyses
• **Marketing Strategies**: Ask for detailed plans
• **Business Decisions**: Get different perspectives

💡 *The more context you provide, the better the responses.*

3.title: Quiz: Consulting
3.question: What is the best practice when using ChatGPT as a specialist?

1.title: Text Analysis
1.content:
ChatGPT can analyze and summarize long texts efficiently.

**Techniques:**
• Executive summary
• Key points extraction
• Sentiment analysis
• Main themes identification

2.title: Information Synthesis
2.content:
Learn to synthesize information:

1. **Copy the text** you want to analyze
2. **Ask for a summary** with main points
3. **Request conclusions** or insights

⚡ *Ideal for long documents, articles, or reports.*

3.title: Quiz: Analysis
3.question: What is NOT a valid analysis technique with ChatGPT?

1.title: Creating Original Content
1.content:
ChatGPT is an excellent assistant for creating content.

**Content types:**
• Blog articles
• Social media posts
• Video scripts
• Newsletters
• Product descriptions

2.title: Optimizing Your Content
2.content:
For better results:

✅ Define your target audience
✅ Specify the tone (formal, casual, fun)
✅ Indicate desired length
✅ Ask for variations

🎯 *Always review and personalize generated content.*

3.title: Quiz: Content
3.question: What should you specify to create good content?

1.title: Professional Emails
1.content:
Write perfect emails with AI:

**Email types:**
• Professional introduction
• Meeting request
• Sales follow-up
• Complaint response
• Internal communication

2.title: Perfect Email Structure
2.content:
Key elements:

1. **Catchy subject** - Brief and clear
2. **Appropriate greeting** - According to context
3. **Concise body** - Main message
4. **Call to action** - What you expect
5. **Professional closing**

3.title: Quiz: Emails
3.question: What is the most important element of a professional email?

options.text: Clear subject and call to action

1.title: Review: Week 1
1.content:
Congratulations on completing the first week! 🎉

**What you learned:**
• What is ChatGPT and its capabilities
• How to create effective prompts
• Specialist techniques
• Text analysis and synthesis
• Content creation
• Professional email writing

2.title: Consolidated Practice
2.content:
Now it's time to practice:

1. **Create 3 prompts** using the specialist technique
2. **Summarize an article** from your field
3. **Write a professional email**

💪 *Constant practice is the key to mastery.*

3.title: Quiz: Review
3.question: What is the key to mastering ChatGPT?

1.title: What is DeepSeek?
1.content:
DeepSeek is an AI specialized in programming and code.

**Features:**
• Code generation
• Assisted debugging
• Code explanation
• Algorithm optimization

2.title: DeepSeek vs Other AIs
2.content:
DeepSeek advantages:

✅ Specialized in code
✅ Better understanding of technical context
✅ More accurate suggestions
✅ Support for multiple languages

3.title: Quiz: DeepSeek Basics
3.question: What does DeepSeek specialize in?

1.title: Generating Code
1.content:
DeepSeek can generate code in multiple languages:

• Python
• JavaScript
• TypeScript
• Java
• C++
• And many more...

2.title: Debugging with AI
2.content:
Use DeepSeek to find errors:

1. **Paste your code** with the error
2. **Describe the expected problem**
3. **Ask for explanation** and solution

🐛 *Debugging has never been easier.*

3.title: Quiz: Code
3.question: What can DeepSeek do with your code?

1.title: Code Optimization
1.content:
DeepSeek can improve your code:

• **Performance**: More efficient algorithms
• **Readability**: Cleaner code
• **Security**: Identify vulnerabilities
• **Best practices**: Design patterns

2.title: Automatic Documentation
2.content:
Generate professional documentation:

• Code comments
• README files
• API documentation
• Usage guides

📝 *Documenting has never been simpler.*

3.title: Quiz: Optimization
3.question: What aspects can DeepSeek improve in your code?

1.title: Getting to Know Claude
1.content:
Claude is an AI created by Anthropic, known for:

• More thoughtful responses
• Better long context understanding
• Focus on safety
• Excellent for deep analysis

2.title: Differences from ChatGPT
2.content:
Claude excels at:

✅ Longer and more coherent texts
✅ More detailed analysis
✅ Less tendency to hallucinate
✅ Better for creative writing

🎭 *Each AI has its strengths.*

3.title: Quiz: Claude Basics
3.question: What does Claude excel at compared to other AIs?

1.title: Claude for Analysis
1.content:
Use Claude for deep analysis:

• Extensive documents
• Contracts and legal documents
• Academic research
• Market analysis

2.title: Analysis Techniques
2.content:
Maximize analysis:

1. **Upload the complete document**
2. **Ask specific questions**
3. **Request comparisons** and conclusions
4. **Ask for executive summaries**

3.title: Quiz: Analysis
3.question: For what type of documents is Claude ideal?

1.title: Claude Artifacts
1.content:
Artifacts are a unique Claude feature:

• Generates executable code
• Creates visualizations
• Interactive documents
• Quick prototypes

2.title: Using Artifacts
2.content:
How to leverage Artifacts:

1. **Ask to create** a visual component
2. **Claude generates** the code
3. **Visualize in real time**
4. **Iterate and improve**

🚀 *From idea to prototype in minutes.*

3.title: Quiz: Artifacts
3.question: What can you create with Claude Artifacts?

1.title: Writing with Claude
1.content:
Claude is excellent for writing:

• **Copywriting**: Persuasive texts
• **Long content**: Complete articles
• **Creativity**: Stories and scripts
• **Professional**: Reports and proposals

2.title: Writing Techniques
2.content:
For better results:

✅ Define style and tone
✅ Specify the audience
✅ Give reference examples
✅ Ask for multiple versions

✍️ *Claude is your ideal co-writer.*

3.title: Quiz: Writing
3.question: What should you define for good writing with Claude?

1.content:
Gemini is Google's AI, integrated with its services:

• Real-time search
• Workspace integration
• Multimodal capabilities
• Access to updated information

2.title: Gemini in the Google Ecosystem
2.content:
Gemini integrates with:

• **Gmail**: Email writing
• **Docs**: Assisted writing
• **Sheets**: Data analysis
• **Search**: Enhanced searches

3.title: Quiz: Gemini Basics
3.question: What is Gemini's unique advantage?

1.content:
Gemini can process multiple content types:

• **Images**: Visual analysis
• **Documents**: PDFs and more

2.title: Image Analysis
2.content:
Use Gemini to analyze images:

1. **Upload the image**
2. **Ask questions** about it
3. **Request detailed descriptions**
4. **Extract relevant information**

📸 *The AI that sees and understands.*

1.title: What is NanoBanana?
1.content:
NanoBanana is an AI tool for art generation:

• Images from text
• Various artistic styles
• High visual quality
• Commercial use allowed

2.title: First Steps
2.content:
How to start with NanoBanana:

1. **Describe your image** in detail
2. **Specify the style** (realistic, cartoon, etc.)
3. **Generate and adjust**
4. **Download in high resolution**

3.title: Quiz: NanoBanana
3.question: What type of content does NanoBanana generate?

1.title: Creating Art with AI
1.content:
Techniques for better results:

• **Detailed prompts**: Describe colors, light, style
• **References**: Mention artists or styles
• **Iteration**: Generate multiple versions
• **Refinement**: Adjust until perfect

2.title: Artistic Styles
2.content:
Explore different styles:

🎨 Realistic
🖌️ Watercolor
✏️ Pencil drawing
🌈 Digital art
🎭 Abstract

*Experiment to find your style.*

3.title: Quiz: Art
3.question: What makes an image prompt more effective?

options.text: Details of color, light, and style

1.title: Styles and Techniques
1.content:
NanoBanana masters various artistic styles. You can create from classic oils to futuristic cyberpunk.

**Popular Styles:**
• Cyberpunk / Sci-fi
• Anime / Manga
• Oil Painting
• 3D Render / Pixar Style
• Photorealism

2.title: Style Modifiers
2.content:
To apply a style, use modifiers at the end of your prompt:

• "...in Van Gogh style"
• "...cinematic lighting, 8k"
• "...flat design, minimalist"

🎨 *The order of words matters: what comes first carries more weight.*

3.title: Quiz: Styles
3.question: What is the best way to define an artistic style in NanoBanana?

options.text: Use specific modifiers in the prompt
It's not possible to change the style

1.title: Practical Project
1.content:
It's time to create your masterpiece! 

**Your Mission:**
Create an image of an "Astronaut riding a horse on Mars" but in 3 different styles:
1. Realistic
2. Cartoon
3. Futuristic

2.title: Refining Results
2.content:
If the result isn't perfect:

1. **Adjust the Prompt**: Be more specific
2. **Use Seed**: To maintain consistency
3. **Iterate**: Generate multiple versions

🚀 *Practice makes perfect.*

3.title: Quiz: Final Project
3.question: What should you do if the generated image isn't what you expected?

options.text: Adjust the prompt and be more specific

• Voice cloning
• Multiple languages
• Various emotions and tones

2.content:
ElevenLabs is ideal for:

🎙️ Podcasts and audiobooks
📹 Video narration
📱 Voice assistants
🌍 Content localization

3.title: Quiz: ElevenLabs

1. **Record samples** of your voice

🎤 *Your voice, multiplied by AI.*

2.content:

• **Pre-designed voices**: Complete library

• **Emotions**: Joy, sadness, excitement
• **Languages**: 29+ languages available

3.title: Quiz: Voices

1.title: Advanced TTS
1.content:
Master text-to-speech:

• **Emotion control**
• **Pauses** (using ---)
• **Emphasis** (UPPERCASE)
• **Natural rhythm**

2.title: Professional Production
2.content:
Complete workflow:

1️⃣ Script preparation
2️⃣ Text formatting
3️⃣ Audio generation
4️⃣ Editing and adjustments
5️⃣ Export in desired format

🎙️ Write an engaging script

1.title: What is ChatGPT?
1.content:
ChatGPT is a language model developed by OpenAI that can understand and generate text naturally.

It was trained on billions of texts and can help you with various daily tasks.

2.title: Why Learn ChatGPT?
2.content:
Learning to use ChatGPT can:

• Increase your productivity by up to 10x
• Automate repetitive tasks
• Generate creative ideas
• Improve your writing

3.title: Quiz: Basic Concepts
3.question: What is ChatGPT's main function?

1.title: Anatomy of a Good Prompt
1.content:
An effective prompt has 4 elements:

1. **Context**: Explain the situation
2. **Instruction**: What you want
3. **Format**: How you want the response
4. **Examples**: If needed

2.title: Common Prompt Errors
2.content:
Avoid these mistakes:

❌ Too vague prompts
❌ Lack of context
❌ Confusing instructions
❌ Unrealistic expectations

3.title: Quiz: Prompts
3.question: Which element is NOT part of a good prompt?

1.title: ChatGPT as a Specialist
1.content:
One of the most powerful techniques is making ChatGPT act as a specialist.

**Example prompt:**
"Act as a nutritionist. Create a meal plan for someone who wants to lose weight."

This technique allows you to get deeper and more contextualized responses.

2.title: Business Consulting with AI
2.content:
Use ChatGPT as a consultant:

• **SWOT Analysis**: Request complete analyses
• **Marketing Strategies**: Ask for detailed plans
• **Business Decisions**: Get different perspectives

💡 *The more context you provide, the better the responses.*

3.title: Quiz: Consulting
3.question: What is the best practice when using ChatGPT as a specialist?

1.title: Text Analysis
1.content:
ChatGPT can analyze and summarize long texts efficiently.

**Techniques:**
• Executive summary
• Key points extraction
• Sentiment analysis
• Main themes identification

2.title: Information Synthesis
2.content:
Learn to synthesize information:

1. **Copy the text** you want to analyze
2. **Ask for a summary** with main points
3. **Request conclusions** or insights

⚡ *Ideal for long documents, articles, or reports.*

3.title: Quiz: Analysis
3.question: What is NOT a valid analysis technique with ChatGPT?

1.title: Creating Original Content
1.content:
ChatGPT is an excellent assistant for creating content.

**Content types:**
• Blog articles
• Social media posts
• Video scripts
• Newsletters
• Product descriptions

2.title: Optimizing Your Content
2.content:
For better results:

✅ Define your target audience
✅ Specify the tone (formal, casual, fun)
✅ Indicate desired length
✅ Ask for variations

🎯 *Always review and personalize generated content.*

3.title: Quiz: Content
3.question: What should you specify to create good content?

1.title: Professional Emails
1.content:
Write perfect emails with AI:

**Email types:**
• Professional introduction
• Meeting request
• Sales follow-up
• Complaint response
• Internal communication

2.title: Perfect Email Structure
2.content:
Key elements:

1. **Catchy subject** - Brief and clear
2. **Appropriate greeting** - According to context
3. **Concise body** - Main message
4. **Call to action** - What you expect
5. **Professional closing**

3.title: Quiz: Emails
3.question: What is the most important element of a professional email?

options.text: Clear subject and call to action

1.title: Review: Week 1
1.content:
Congratulations on completing the first week! 🎉

**What you learned:**
• What is ChatGPT and its capabilities
• How to create effective prompts
• Specialist techniques
• Text analysis and synthesis
• Content creation
• Professional email writing

2.title: Consolidated Practice
2.content:
Now it's time to practice:

1. **Create 3 prompts** using the specialist technique
2. **Summarize an article** from your field
3. **Write a professional email**

💪 *Constant practice is the key to mastery.*

3.title: Quiz: Review
3.question: What is the key to mastering ChatGPT?

1.title: What is NanoBanana?
1.content:
NanoBanana is an AI tool for art generation:

• Images from text
• Various artistic styles
• High visual quality
• Commercial use allowed

2.title: First Steps
2.content:
How to start with NanoBanana:

1. **Describe your image** in detail
2. **Specify the style** (realistic, cartoon, etc.)
3. **Generate and adjust**
4. **Download in high resolution**

3.title: Quiz: NanoBanana
3.question: What type of content does NanoBanana generate?

1.title: Creating Art with AI
1.content:
Techniques for better results:

• **Detailed prompts**: Describe colors, light, style
• **References**: Mention artists or styles
• **Iteration**: Generate multiple versions
• **Refinement**: Adjust until perfect

2.title: Artistic Styles
2.content:
Explore different styles:

🎨 Realistic
🖌️ Watercolor
✏️ Pencil drawing
🌈 Digital art
🎭 Abstract

*Experiment to find your style.*

3.title: Quiz: Art
3.question: What makes an image prompt more effective?

options.text: Details of color, light, and style

1.title: Styles and Techniques
1.content:
NanoBanana masters various artistic styles. You can create from classic oils to futuristic cyberpunk.

**Popular Styles:**
• Cyberpunk / Sci-fi
• Anime / Manga
• Oil Painting
• 3D Render / Pixar Style
• Photorealism

2.title: Style Modifiers
2.content:
To apply a style, use modifiers at the end of your prompt:

• "...in Van Gogh style"
• "...cinematic lighting, 8k"
• "...flat design, minimalist"

🎨 *The order of words matters: what comes first carries more weight.*

3.title: Quiz: Styles
3.question: What is the best way to define an artistic style in NanoBanana?

options.text: Use specific modifiers in the prompt
It's not possible to change the style

1.title: Practical Project
1.content:
It's time to create your masterpiece! 

**Your Mission:**
Create an image of an "Astronaut riding a horse on Mars" but in 3 different styles:
1. Realistic
2. Cartoon
3. Futuristic

2.title: Refining Results
2.content:
If the result isn't perfect:

1. **Adjust the Prompt**: Be more specific
2. **Use Seed**: To maintain consistency
3. **Iterate**: Generate multiple versions

🚀 *Practice makes perfect.*

3.title: Quiz: Final Project
3.question: What should you do if the generated image isn't what you expected?

options.text: Adjust the prompt and be more specific

If your use of materials from this site results in the need for servicing, repair, or correction of equipment or data, you assume any costs thereof.

Educly will not be responsible for any outcome that may occur during the course of usage of our resources. We reserve the right to change prices and revise the resources usage policy at any time.

These Subscription Terms constitute a contract between you and Educly (referred to in these Subscription Terms as "Educly", "us" or "our"), the provider of the Educly website and the services accessible from the Educly website (which are collectively referred to in these Subscription Terms as the "Educly Service").

definitions.intro: To help explain things as clearly as possible in these Subscription Terms, every time any of these terms are referenced, they are strictly defined as:
definitions.cookie: Cookie: small amount of data generated by a website and saved by your web browser. It is used to identify your browser, provide analytics, remember information about you such as your language preference or login information.

Company: when this policy mentions "Company", "we" or "our", it refers to:
• SELLCORE LTD, a company registered in Saint Kitts and Nevis

These entities are jointly responsible for your information under these Subscription Terms.

definitions.device: Device: any internet connected device such as a phone, tablet, computer or any other device that can be used to visit Educly and use the services.
definitions.service: Service: refers to the service provided by Educly as described in the relative terms (if available) and on this platform.

refundPolicy.title: Return and Refund Policy
refundPolicy.intro:
Thank you for subscribing to Educly. We appreciate the fact that you like the educational content we provide. We also want to make sure you have a rewarding experience while you are exploring, evaluating, and using our platform.

If, for any reason, you are not completely satisfied with any service that we provide, do not hesitate to contact us and we will discuss any of the issues you are going through with our platform.
refundPolicy.subscriptionRefunds:
Subscription Refunds: We provide refunds at our own discretion and subject to the laws and our policies that may be posted from time to time. A refund will be provided if we deem the request to be acceptable.

Please note that after your subscription period expires, we will not be able to refund you as the service will be deemed consumed in its entirety, unless applicable laws provide otherwise.
refundPolicy.digitalContent: Additionally, when you make a purchase of digital content (such as video recordings, PDF files or AI-generated educational materials), you expressly agree that such content is made available to you immediately and therefore you lose your right of withdrawal and will not be eligible for a refund.
